prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a young Asian woman with a {argument name="hair style and color" default="short black bob haircut and bangs"}, seen in profile. She is {argument name="action" default="smoking a cigarette"}, holding it to her lips with her right hand, with a thin trail of blue smoke rising. She is {argument name="setting" default="leaning against a metal balcony railing at night"}. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="white camisole and a light grey oversized cardigan that has slipped off her shoulder"}, exposing her bare shoulder and back. She has a small pearl earring. The background is dark with blurred, out-of-focus warm city lights. The image features a {argument name="aesthetic" default="cinematic, moody atmosphere with noticeable film grain and a direct flash photography aesthetic"}.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的年轻亚裔女性肖像，侧面视角，留着 {argument name="hair style and color" default="黑色短波波头和刘海"}。她正在 {argument name="action" default="抽烟"}，右手将烟卷递至唇边，一缕淡淡的蓝色烟雾升起。她 {argument name="setting" default="在夜晚倚靠着金属阳台栏杆"}。她穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="白色吊带背心和一件从肩头滑落的浅灰色大码开衫"}，露出了裸露的肩膀和背部。她戴着一枚小珍珠耳环。背景是一片漆黑，伴有模糊的暖色城市灯光。画面呈现出 {argument name="aesthetic" default="电影感、情绪化的氛围，带有明显的胶片颗粒感和直闪摄影美学"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感夜间女性肖像摄影：生成一张写实、充满情绪的夜间女性倚靠阳台肖像，非常适合电影角色概念设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: film grain]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
